body_txt: Similar to the Halloween Enthusiast , a Christmas enthusiast is a character who's crazy for Christmas. With this character, every inch of their house will be decked out in Christmas decorations. They'll insist on wearing "ugly Christmas sweaters." They could even be a Manchild who Still Believes in Santa , or will dress up as Santa Claus . Over-the-Top Christmas Decorations is a common trait. Sometimes, this kind of character may wish for Christmas Every Day but usually comes to regret it over many, many loops . Reasons for the enthusiasm vary. They may simply enjoy the giving and loving associated with Christmas. On a slightly darker note, they might be swept up in the materialism of the holiday. They could be a child who enjoys getting presents and eating holiday goodies, or they could be a parent (or grandparent) who wants to make the holiday magical/special for their kids. Sub-Trope of Holiday Aficionado . If a character is themed around Christmas yet not explicitly an enthusiast for the holiday, that's Holiday Motif , though it's possible for the two tropes to overlap. Compare to the aforementioned Halloween Enthusiast . Also compare to The Anti-Grinch , for someone who loves Christmas but messes it up when trying to celebrate it. Contrast Crappy Holidays and The Grinch .
